bio.intro: I am Swanand and I code.
bio.description:
I completed my Master's degree in Computer Science at Arizona State University. Previously, I worked as a Software Engineer at HSBC, where I played a crucial role in developing feature-rich mobile banking applications to enhance customer experience and optimize transactions. With a solid background in Web and Android development, I possess expertise in AWS Cloud services.

I am actively pursuing full-time software engineer opportunities to utilize my exceptional academic achievements and hands-on experience, aiming to create significant contributions within the technology industry.

If you are seeking someone to build scalable and high-quality software products, feel free to reach out to me on phone/email mentioned below.

Have a great day!!
